div1.entryFree:
Brazen, made of brass: lived registered upon our b. tombs, LLL I, 1, 2. with his (the bell's) iron tongue and b. mouth, John III, 3, 38. a b. canstick, H4A III, 1, 131. b. images, H6B I, 3, 63. b. cannon, Hml. I, 1, 73. b. trumpet, R2 III, 3, 33 and Troil. IV, 5, 7; and hence: trumpeters, with b. din blast you the city's ear, Ant. IV, 8, 36.
Figuratively, == extremely strong, impregnable: loosed them (the winds) forth their b. caves, H6B III, 2, 89. that thy b. gates of heaven may ope, H6C II, 3, 40. wert thou environed with a b. wall, II, 4, 4.
